song.title: Because He Lives
song.author: Bill & Gloria Gaither
song.lyrics: [v1] 1) God sent His Son, They called Him Jesus He came to love, heal, and forgive; He lived and died to buy my pardon, An empty grave is there To prove my Savior lives. [v2] 2) How sweet to hold A newborn baby, And feel the pride and joy He gives; But greater still, the calm assurance, This child can face Uncertain days because He lives. [c] Chorus Because He Lives, I can face tomorrow Because He Lives, all fear is gone Because I know, He holds the future And life is worth the living Just because He lives [v3] 3) And then one day I’ll cross that river, I’ll fight life’s final war with pain; And then as death Gives way to victory, I’ll see the lights of glory And I’ll know He reigns.
